title: Log in to CommunityRule
subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a magic link to sign in. No password needed!
saveProgressSubtitle: We need your email to save, and we'll send you a magic link to sign in. If you don't save now you could lose your progress.
successBody: We sent a sign-in link. Open it on this device to continue.
legalPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our

errors.network: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
errors.invalidLink: That sign-in link is not valid. Request a new one from the login page.
errors.expiredLink: That sign-in link has expired. Request a new one from the login page.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong on our end. Try again later.
